entity.country_or_origin: BNB Chain, Fantom, and Metis ecosystems
entity.summary: Multichain decentralized exchange and DeFi protocol with automated-market-maker trading, current liquidity, and active spot-swap volume across BNB Chain, Fantom, and Metis.
entity.notes: The official HyperJump GitHub organization links the current hyperjump.app domain and publishes protocol contracts and user documentation repositories. DefiLlama reports current TVL across BNB Chain, Fantom, and Metis plus non-zero recent DEX volume, supporting active classification.

evidence.title: HyperJump official GitHub organization
evidence.notes: Official organization links hyperjump.app and publishes pinned HyperJump contracts and user-documentation repositories, establishing protocol and domain identity.

evidence.title: HyperJump metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry reports current TVL across BNB Chain, Fantom, and Metis together with non-zero 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour DEX volume.

evidence.title: HyperJump DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies HyperJump as a multichain decentralized exchange venue.
